Histopathological  examination  of  various  groups  Hematoxylin  and  eosin  were
used to stain the brain after 1 h of MCAO of various groups for histopathological
examination  followed  by  24  h  of  reperfusion  (Fig.  13).  Frontal  cortex  part  was
collected for the brain sectioning to evaluate any alteration in histopathology of
treated brain. No alteration in pathology of neurons was found in the SHAM group.
